headline: These 2 Consumer Discretionary Stocks Could Beat Earnings: Why They Should Be on Your Radar
summary: Why investors should use the Zacks Earnings ESP tool to help find stocks that are poised to top quarterly earnings estimates.

headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on MGM Resorts International, Lowers Price Target to $39
summary: UBS  analyst Robin Farley   maintains MGM Resorts International (NYSE:MGM) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $40 to $39.
